pronunciation: /藞t瑟艐k蓹r瑟艐 w瑟冒 h瑟藞st蓲r瑟k蓹l 藞f蕣t瑟d蕭/
englishDefinitions: Making small changes to old video recordings, often in a way that may affect accuracy or authenticity.
persianTranslation: 丿爻鬲讴丕乇蹖 丿乇 鬲氐丕賵蹖乇 丌乇卮蹖賵蹖 鬲丕乇蹖禺蹖
賵蹖乇丕蹖卮 噩夭卅蹖賽 鬲氐丕賵蹖乇 鬲丕乇蹖禺蹖
examples: The documentary was criticized for tinkering with historical footage.
Some editors avoid tinkering with historical footage unless necessary.
Tinkering with historical footage can raise ethical concerns.
